allow: Bash(cmd /c "python -c ""import json; data=json.load\(open\(''c:/Users/Field User/Downloads/openapi.json''\)\); [print\(p\) for p in data[''paths'']]""")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Content ''c:/Users/Field User/Downloads/openapi.json'' | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty paths | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object Name")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName capwatch.flwg.internal -Port 8000; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName capwatch.flwg.internal -Port 80; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName capwatch.flwg.internal -Port 443")
